title: Headhunter (disambiguation)
content:
'''Headhunter''' could refer to one of the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Clone Z-95 Headhunter]]''', a model of [[starfighter]]
*The '''[[Z-95 Headhunter]]''', a model of starfighter
*The '''[[Z-75 Headhunter]]''', a model of [[starship]]
*The '''[[Coromon Headhunter]]''', a creature

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
* The '''[[Clone Z-95 starfighter/Legends|Clone Z-95 starfighter]]''', also known as '''clone Z-95 Headhunter''', a model of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]
* The [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|'''Z-95 Headhunter''']], a model of starfighter
*'''[[Headhunter Flight]]''', an impromptu starfighter squadron
*'''[[Headhunter Company]]''', a unit of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]]
*'''[[Headhunters]]''', a criminal gang on [[Genarius]]
*The '''[[coromon headhunter]]''', a nocturnal predator

{{Disambig}}
